sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GH - Guardant Health Inc Options
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed financial overview of Guardant Health Inc. (GH), including its stock performance, key financial metrics, analyst recommendations, and insider activity. It highlights the company's valuation ratios, growth rates, and market statistics as of its last close on June 30.

feed.title: Federal Realty appoints Paige Pitcher as SVP of digital innovation By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President of Digital Innovation. In this newly created role, Pitcher will lead the company's AI and technology strategy across various functions, reporting directly to the President and CEO. This strategic hire follows a strong first quarter for Federal Realty and multiple analyst upgrades, indicating a positive growth trajectory for the company.

feed.title: Prologis Appoints Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) has appointed Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to its board of directors. Kelly previously served as CEO of Visa Inc. and held senior leadership roles at American Express Company. His extensive experience in technology, risk, and global markets is expected to be a valuable asset to Prologis's board.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Highlights Longstanding Partnership with the National Medal of Honor Museum Foundation as America Commemorates the 250th Anniversary of Its Founding
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) has reaffirmed its essential partnership with the National Medal of Honor Museum Foundation (NMOHM), emphasizing their shared mission to preserve and share the stories of Medal of Honor Recipients as America approaches its 250th anniversary. This collaboration highlights Alexandria's commitment to corporate responsibility, having significantly contributed to the establishment and success of the National Medal of Honor Museum. The Museum, which opened in March 2025 in Arlington, Texas, is dedicated to honoring Medal of Honor Recipients through immersive exhibits and educational programs, and was recently recognized as "Best New Museum" by USA Today Reader's Choice 2026.

feed.title: Align Technology to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on July 29, 2026
feed.summary: Align Technology (Nasdaq: ALGN) is scheduled to release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, after the market closes. The results will be available on the Investor Relations section of the Align website. Following the release, the company will host a conference call and audio webcast to discuss the financial outcomes.

feed.title: ICE and NATIVX plan futures for AI compute prices
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and NATIVX have announced plans to launch GPU compute futures contracts to provide pricing transparency and risk management for the rapidly growing AI compute market. These U.S. dollar-denominated, cash-settled contracts will be based on NATIVX's COIL Index, which tracks energy-normalized, tokenized GPU compute and connectivity prices. The initiative aims to establish compute as a transparent and manageable asset class, allowing market participants to hedge GPU exposure alongside existing energy contracts.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin contributing millions toward new White House helipad
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin is donating $5 million towards the construction of a new permanent helipad on the White House grounds. This move comes as new Marine One helicopters have exhaust vents that are reportedly damaging the White House's famous green lawn. The article highlights the involvement of President Donald Trump in moving forward with the helipad project.

feed.title: AIG names Nancy Bewlay as global chief underwriting officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) announced that Nancy Bewlay will join the company as Executive Vice President and Global Chief Underwriting Officer, effective September 8, 2026. Bewlay will oversee AIG's underwriting strategy and organization, bringing over 30 years of insurance industry experience from previous roles at AXA Group, Swiss Re, C.V. Starr, and General Star Management Company. The article also notes AIG's strong Q1 2026 earnings, its acquisition of Everest Colombia, and the appointment of Thomas Stoddard to its board, highlighting the company's strategic activities.

feed.title: Revvity adds Signals connector to Anthropic’s Claude platform By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revvity Inc. has integrated its Signals Software business with Anthropic’s Claude AI platform through a new Model Context Protocol connector. This integration allows scientists to access and analyze R&D data using natural language within Claude, leveraging Signals AI's capabilities for governed data and scientific context. The move aims to enhance decision-making and action in critical health science research and development.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts Price Target on Triumph Financial to $84 From $72, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for Triumph Financial (TFIN) from $72 to $84, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued analyst confidence in the financial holding company, which operates in banking, factoring, payments, and data intelligence for the trucking industry. The news highlights recent activities surrounding Triumph Financial, including its Q1 2026 earnings beat and new product launches leveraging freight transaction data.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs is set to release its Q2 earnings on July 14, with analysts projecting $13.95 EPS and $15.9 billion in revenue. The company also plans to increase its quarterly dividend from $4.50 to $5.00 per share. Several analysts have recently updated their ratings and price targets for GS stock, with varied sentiments from Underperform to Overweight.

feed.title: Trump secured over $50 million in loan from Charles Schwab in 2025, ethics filing shows By Reuters
feed.summary: Donald Trump obtained a loan exceeding $50 million from Charles Schwab Bank in 2025, according to his annual ethics disclosure. The loan is a pledged-asset line, using investments as collateral, and carries a 3.9% interest rate. The filing also revealed over $1.4 billion in income from his family's crypto ventures, highlighting the impact of digital assets on his finances.

feed.title: SLB Expands Lease at Former GM Plant
feed.summary: SLB, formerly Schlumberger, has expanded its lease at the former General Motors plant in Shreveport, Louisiana, now known as Industrial Realty Group’s Shreveport Business Park. This expansion brings SLB's footprint to 3.1 million square feet, making the 3.5 million square feet industrial campus fully occupied. The move is expected to increase SLB's employee count at the plant from 820 to 1,200, significantly boosting the regional economy.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Real Estate Companies: Simon Property (SPG) and EPR Properties (EPR)
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan analyst Michael Mueller maintained a Hold rating on Simon Property (SPG) with a $231.00 price target, despite the analyst consensus being a Moderate Buy with a lower average price target. For EPR Properties (EPR), J.P. Morgan's Anthony Paolone issued a Buy rating with a $62.00 price target, aligning with the Moderate Buy consensus. The article highlights the differing sentiments and price targets from various analysts for both real estate companies.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on Top Technology Stocks: Akamai (AKAM), Procore Technologies (PCOR)
feed.summary: Three analysts have issued bullish sentiments on technology stocks Akamai (AKAM), Procore Technologies (PCOR), and Septerna, Inc. (SEPN). Akamai received a Buy rating with a $180 price target, Procore Technologies a Buy with a $65 target, and Septerna, Inc. also a Buy rating. The consensus among analysts indicates significant upside potential for all three companies.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts U.S. Bancorp Price Target to $61 From $59, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has increased its price target for U.S. Bancorp (USB) to $61 from $59, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions on the financial institution, with some trimming price targets and others maintaining their ratings. The article also notes other recent news concerning U.S. Bancorp, including dividend announcements and acquisition completions.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Truist Financial Price Target to $50 From $51, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has adjusted its price target for Truist Financial (NYSE: TFC) to $50, down from $51, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the analyst's outlook for the financial holding company. The article also notes other recent analyst actions, including downgrades from Raymond James and Citigroup.

feed.title: ADP National Employment Report: Private Sector Employment Increased by 98,000 Jobs in June; Annual Pay was Up 4.4%
feed.summary: Private sector employment increased by 98,000 jobs in June 2026, with an annual pay increase of 4.4% according to the ADP National Employment Report. Job creation was uneven, with financial activities and information sectors gaining, while leisure and hospitality continued a six-month streak of weak hiring. The report also noted that median pay gains for job-stayers remained at 4.4%, while job-changers saw accelerated annual pay growth of 6.6%.

feed.title: General Mills swings to $2B loss, plans $3B in cost cuts by 2030
feed.summary: General Mills reported a Q4 loss of over $2 billion, primarily due to non-cash charges. In response, the Golden Valley-based company announced plans to implement $3 billion in cost cuts by 2030. This strategic move aims to improve the company's financial performance following its recent losses.

feed.title: ADP says U.S. private payrolls rose 98,000 as pay held at 4.4%
feed.summary: The ADP National Employment Report for June 2026 indicates that U.S. private-sector employment increased by 98,000 jobs, with annual pay for job-stayers rising by 4.4% and for job-changers by 6.6%. Service-providing industries led job creation, adding 96,000 positions, notably in education and health services. The report suggests a slowdown in job creation attributed to hiring patterns and labor supply constraints.

It lists various corporate events such as AGMs, earnings calls, and conferences from 2022 through 2026, offering transcripts and reports to help evaluate financial performance and operational updates.

feed.title: CVBF Upgraded by Raymond James -- Rating Changed to Outperform
feed.summary: Raymond James has upgraded CVB Financial (CVBF) from "Market Perform" to "Outperform," setting a new price target of $25.00. While this upgrade indicates positive sentiment, GuruFocus suggests the stock is currently 6.6% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $21.16. Despite insider buying activity totaling $3.0 million, the company's financial strength and growth scores are low, suggesting investors should carefully consider these mixed signals.

feed.title: Jones Trading initiates FTAI Infrastructure stock with buy rating
feed.summary: Jones Trading has initiated coverage on FTAI Infrastructure Inc. (NASDAQ:FIP) with a Buy rating and a price target of $8.75, citing its diverse investments in rail, energy, and intermodal transport. The firm highlights significant AEBITDA growth expected from rail operations and the positive impact of the upcoming $1.52 billion sale of Long Ridge, which will reduce the company's substantial debt. This analysis comes despite a recent EPS miss but follows a slight revenue beat in Q1 2026 and strategic acquisitions like Tidewater Logistics.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Stock
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has raised its price target for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) to $70 from $62, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a potential 9.07% upside. Despite the positive forecast from Goldman Sachs, the overall analyst consensus for Brown & Brown remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $78.25. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.39 EPS and revenue of $1.90 billion, a 35.4% increase year-over-year.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates HCA Healthcare stock rating at Overweight
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated an "Overweight" rating for HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) with a price target of $588.00, suggesting significant upside from its current price. The firm noted attractive pricing metrics for the hospital operator, despite consensus expectations for a step-down in results. Additionally, the article mentions HCA Healthcare's acquisition of The College of Health Care Professions and recent news regarding executive changes and a gene-editing therapy trial.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates Neutral rating on Realty Income stock
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has maintained its Neutral rating and $65.00 price target for Realty Income (NYSE:O) after the company announced a new data center joint venture. Realty Income will invest $1.4 billion for a 45% equity stake in three Northern Virginia data center assets, with total venture value expected to exceed $6 billion. The REIT currently offers a 5.25% dividend yield and has a 33-year history of dividend payments.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Q2 2026 results and outlook call set for July 28
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) will release its Q2 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, covering the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The company will host a webcast conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT the same day to discuss results and its outlook for Q3 and full year 2026. This announcement schedules SHW’s Q2 2026 results and call, continuing a pattern where earnings-date news has averaged about 1.47% moves.

feed.title: Invesco QQQ Trust from Invesco Ltd. - tech-heavy ETF quietly anchors many US portfolios
feed.summary: The Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ) tracks the Nasdaq-100 Index, offering investors concentrated exposure to large-cap growth stocks, primarily in technology and communication services. It's a key product for Invesco Ltd. and a popular choice for retail investors seeking growth, despite its sector concentration risks. QQQ acts as an "accessory" ETF in many US portfolios, often used to overweight technology alongside broader market funds.

feed.title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for Second-Quarter Results
feed.summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX) announced it will hold a conference call on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 5:30 p.m. ET to discuss its second-quarter results for the period ended June 30, 2026. Interested parties can listen live via phone or a simultaneous webcast available on the Investor Relations site, with a replay accessible afterward. Equinix provides digital infrastructure, data centers, and interconnected ecosystems globally.

feed.title: Army Awards Lockheed Martin Nearly $3 Billion for Sentinel A4 Radar Program
feed.summary: The U.S. Army has awarded Lockheed Martin Corp. a contract worth nearly $3 billion for Sentinel A4 radar production and engineering services. This significant award is part of a broader list of defense contracts totaling over $7.5 million, covering various services and equipment for the Army, Defense Logistics Agency, Navy, and Air Force. Other major contract recipients include The Oak Group Inc., General Electric Co., and Sysco Seattle Inc.

feed.title: Federal Realty Names Paige Pitcher Senior Vice President, Digital Innovation
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President, Digital Innovation, effective July 1, 2026. In this newly created role, Pitcher will lead the company's efforts to accelerate innovation and AI integration across its business, reporting directly to the President & CEO. Her focus will be on applying AI and technology to leasing, operations, and investment to drive value creation and improve efficiency within Federal Realty's portfolio.

feed.title: Rise and Grind: The Court Takes Up Whether Trademark Strength Is Fact or Law
feed.summary: The Supreme Court has granted certiorari in RiseandShine Corp. v. PepsiCo, Inc. to determine whether trademark strength is a question of fact or law in trademark disputes. This decision will clarify the procedural aspect of the likelihood-of-confusion analysis under 15 U.S.C. § 1114, impacting summary judgment and appellate review for trademark cases. The ruling will also address a legal circuit split and internal judicial philosophies regarding the role of juries in civil cases.

feed.title: McKesson (NYSE: MCK) EVP Rodgers to retire, Srinivasan to lead strategy
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation announced that Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy and Business Development Officer Thomas L. Rodgers will retire on August 1, 2026. Ramesh Srinivasan will succeed him as Executive Vice President, Chief Strategy Officer, effective the same day, ensuring a smooth leadership transition. This change was reported in an 8-K filing on June 29, 2026, and is described as a planned retirement with a designated successor to maintain continuity in the company's strategy leadership.

feed.title: Here Are Wednesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Abbott Laboratories, Circle Internet, Dow, Kratos Defense, Lockheed Martin, Salesforce, ServiceNow,SpaceX, and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes Wednesday's Wall Street analyst research calls, including upgrades, downgrades, and new initiations for various companies like Lockheed Martin, Salesforce, and Dow. It contextualizes these calls within the broader market performance, noting strong first-half returns for major U.S. indices despite concerns about overbought conditions and underperformance from the Magnificent 7. The report also provides updates on pre-market futures, treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency markets.

feed.title: Taiwan Detains Super Micro Workers in China Chip Smuggling Probe
feed.summary: Taiwanese authorities have detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees and are investigating four in total following a raid regarding alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China. The Keelung District Court approved the detention of two employees, while the other two were released on bail but are restricted from leaving Taiwan. The investigation centers on charges of falsifying documents and breach of trust.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Price Target on Fifth Third Bancorp to $59 From $52, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has increased its price target for Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) to $59 from $52, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the research firm regarding the bank's future performance. The article also provides a brief company profile, financial data, and other recent analyst recommendations for Fifth Third Bancorp.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Stock Trades at $81 With a $86 Analyst Target and $105 TIKR Mid-Case: The Gap Explained
feed.summary: Coca-Cola (KO) stock is currently trading at $81, with analysts setting a mean price target of $86, indicating a 6% upside. TIKR's mid-case model, however, projects a valuation of $105 by December 2030, suggesting a 30% total return. The company delivered strong Q1 2026 results, beating EPS estimates and showing unit case volume growth across all segments, despite geopolitical uncertainties and nuanced consumer spending patterns.

feed.title: GlobalFoundries schedules Q2 2026 earnings call for August 5, 2026
feed.summary: GlobalFoundries (NASDAQ: GFS) has scheduled a conference call for August 5, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss its second quarter 2026 financial results. Investors can register online to join the call, and a webcast will be available on the company's investor relations website. This event is crucial for insights into the semiconductor manufacturer's recent performance and future outlook.

feed.title: Daiwa Securities Adjusts Price Target on NetApp to $180 From $117, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Daiwa Securities has increased its price target for NetApp (NTAP) to $180, up from $117, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a significant positive outlook for the company from the analyst firm. NetApp specializes in data management and storage equipment, offering a diversified portfolio of products and services including product sales, support, and cloud services.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 28, 2026
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. EDT on the same day to discuss the results and provide an outlook for the third quarter and full year 2026, with participation from CEO Heidi Petz and other senior executives.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific to Hold Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, July 23, 2026
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 23, 2026, before market open. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss its financial performance and future expectations. A live webcast of the call will be available on the "Investors" section of their website, with a replay accessible until October 21, 2026.

feed.title: TE Connectivity sets July 22 call for fiscal Q3 results
feed.summary: TE Connectivity (NYSE: TEL) will report its fiscal 2026 third quarter financial results before market open on July 22, 2026. The company will host an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET, accessible via its investor website and telephone, with a replay available later that morning. The announcement provides key financial data, conference call details, and historical stock reaction patterns to similar announcements.

feed.title: Revvity lets scientists tap R&D data in Claude through new connector
feed.summary: Revvity's Signals Software business has integrated with Anthropic's Claude AI, enabling scientists to securely access and interact with R&D data and knowledge using natural language within Claude. This integration, powered by a new Model Context Protocol (MCP) connector, aims to accelerate scientific research by connecting Claude's reasoning capabilities with trusted, ontology-driven scientific context managed within Revvity Signals AI. The collaboration ensures AI models have access to reliable scientific data, enhancing analysis and decision-making for researchers.

feed.title: Genius Group turns $4.3M operating profit in Q2 2026
feed.summary: Genius Group (NYSE American: GNS) reported unaudited Q2 2026 operational results, achieving a net profit from operations of $4.3 million, a significant turnaround from a $2.3 million loss in Q2 2025. The company saw a 112% year-on-year revenue increase to $3.2 million and a 978% rise in gross profit to $1.5 million. Key highlights also include strategic investments in AI education platforms, a stake in Jewel Bank, plans for a $100 million AI Treasury portfolio, and substantial share buybacks and cancellations totaling 27% of the float.

feed.title: AIG Appoints Nancy Bewlay as Global Chief Underwriting Officer
feed.summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) has appointed Nancy Bewlay as Executive Vice President, Global Chief Underwriting Officer, effective September 8, 2026. Bewlay, who previously served as Group Chief Underwriting & Pricing Officer at AXA Group, will be responsible for AIG's underwriting strategy and global underwriting organization. She brings over 30 years of experience in the insurance industry to her new role at AIG.

feed.title: Agilent Launches AI-Driven Analysis Module for Agilent xCELLigence RTCA eSight – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) has launched Agilent xCELLigence RTCA eSight AI, an AI-powered software module designed to simplify label-free imaging analysis in real-time cell analysis. This new module reduces manual steps and variability, offering researchers a more consistent and efficient approach to understanding cell behavior. It integrates AI-driven analysis with the existing dual-readout capabilities of the xCELLigence RTCA eSight instrument, accelerating drug discovery and high-throughput biopharma research.

feed.title: Federal Realty taps AI veteran to lead innovation across its retail centers
feed.summary: Federal Realty (NYSE:FRT) has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President, Digital Innovation, effective July 1, 2026. In this new role, Pitcher will lead the company's applied AI and technology strategy across leasing, operations, and investment to enhance speed and efficiency. She brings over 15 years of experience in real estate, technology, and investment, previously leading innovation at Hines and driving AI integration for various real estate firms.
